evals.prompt: I've been setting up this IoT project with BMAD and all the planning docs are done. Sprint status file exists with 3 epics, first one is in-progress with story 1.2 ready-for-dev. Go ahead and auto implement the rest.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator reads sprint-status.yaml, detects Epic 1 in-progress, skips story 1.1 (done), starts story 1.2 at Step 3 (Develop), creates team, spawns story-developer sub-agent.

assertions.name: reads_sprint_status_first
assertions.description: Orchestrator reads sprint-status.yaml before doing anything else

assertions.name: skips_done_stories
assertions.description: Skips story 1.1 which is already done

assertions.name: resumes_at_correct_step
assertions.description: Story 1.2 with ready-for-dev status starts at Step 3 (Develop), not Step 1

assertions.name: spawns_team_subagent
assertions.description: Uses Agent tool with team_name parameter, not a disposable sub-agent

evals.prompt: Start the automatic implementation phase. Note: there is no sprint-status.yaml file yet, I only have the planning docs ready.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator checks for sprint-status.yaml, finds it missing, invokes bmad-help skill to suggest next actions, reports to user and stops without entering main loop.

assertions.name: checks_file_existence
assertions.description: Checks if sprint-status.yaml exists before proceeding

assertions.name: calls_bmad_help
assertions.description: Invokes bmad-help skill when sprint-status.yaml is missing

assertions.name: does_not_enter_main_loop
assertions.description: Does NOT create a team or spawn sub-agents

evals.prompt: What's the status of the implementation? How many stories are done?
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator reads sprint-status.yaml, summarizes progress (epics done/in-progress, stories done/remaining), reports any blockers, and does NOT continue the main loop.

assertions.name: reports_summary
assertions.description: Provides a summary of epic and story progress

assertions.name: does_not_continue_loop
assertions.description: Does NOT enter the main loop or spawn any sub-agents

evals.prompt: auto implement - all epics and stories in the sprint-status.yaml are marked as done already
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator reads sprint-status.yaml, detects all work is complete, invokes bmad-help for next action suggestions, reports completion and stops.

assertions.name: detects_all_done
assertions.description: Correctly identifies that all epics and stories are done

assertions.name: calls_bmad_help_on_completion
assertions.description: Invokes bmad-help skill to suggest next actions

assertions.name: does_not_enter_main_loop
assertions.description: Does NOT create a team or start working on stories

evals.prompt: begin phase 4 implementation. The sub-agent developing story 2.1 reported that it needs me to manually create an AWS S3 bucket and configure IAM permissions before it can proceed.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator instructs the sub-agent to investigate automation first (AWS CLI, CloudFormation, Terraform, CDK). Only halts for user if automation is truly impossible.

assertions.name: investigates_automation
assertions.description: Sub-agent or orchestrator investigates if the manual task can be automated (AWS CLI, IaC tools)

assertions.name: does_not_immediately_halt
assertions.description: Does NOT immediately halt and ask the user - tries automation first
